asset.title: Workbook Style Toggle
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates the workbook style toggle feature, showing seamless transitions between Excel File, Sheets Collab, and Evidence Review modes while maintaining cell selection and versioned state.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly shows the user toggling between Excel File, Sheets Collab, and Evidence Review modes with corresponding UI changes.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the complete flow from opening the file to switching through all three available workbook views.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with well-aligned panels, though the dense spreadsheet data is slightly compact.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with NodeRoom's multi-agent and versioned spreadsheet workspace concept.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from the running application with real-time UI responses and trace updates.

legibility.evidence: Main UI elements are highly legible, though some small cell values and trace logs require close attention.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses financial and audit workflows where Excel compatibility and provenance are critical.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents local UI style changes without overclaiming backend synchronization speed.

observedEvidence: Excel File view with merged cells and formula bar
Sheets Collab view maintaining active cell selection
Evidence Review view showing provenance and versioning
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Toggle between Excel File, Sheets Collab, and Evidence Review modes to seamlessly transition from raw spreadsheet analysis to collaborative editing and audit-ready provenance.
